amount_must_be_integer: Amount must be an integer (no decimal)

gateway_unsupported: The payment gateway is not supported
gateway_currency_unsupported: The payment gateway does not support the required currency
webhook_signature_missing: The payment webhook signature is missing
webhook_invalid: The payment webhook could not be verified
webhook_processing_failed: Unable to process the payment webhook
payment_reconciliation_failed: Payment details do not match the order
successful_payment_not_found: No successful payment was found for this order
